children.heading: Construction of chapter as superseding, amending, modifying, or repealing certain laws
children.label: a Construction of chapter as superseding, amending, modifying, or repealing certain laws

children.text: The Federal Metal and Nonmetallic Mine Safety Act ().30 U.S.C. 721–740
The Federal Coal Mine Health and Safety Act of 1969 () [ et seq.].83 Stat. 74230 U.S.C. 801
The Federal Water Pollution Control Act (), as amended [ et seq.], the State laws enacted pursuant thereto, or other Federal laws relating to preservation of water quality.79 Stat. 90333 U.S.C. 1251
The Clean Air Act, as amended [ et seq.].42 U.S.C. 7401
The Solid Waste Disposal Act [ et seq.].42 U.S.C. 6901
The Fish and Wildlife Coordination Act of 1934 ().16 U.S.C. 661–666c
The Mineral Leasing Act of 1920, as amended ( et seq.).30 U.S.C. 181

children.heading: Effect on authority of Secretary or heads of other Federal agencies
children.label: b Effect on authority of Secretary or heads of other Federal agencies
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall affect in any way the authority of the Secretary or the heads of other Federal agencies under other provisions of law to include in any lease, license, permit, contract, or other instrument such conditions as may be appropriate to regulate surface coal mining and reclamation operations on land under their jurisdiction.

children.heading: Cooperation
children.label: c Cooperation
children.text: To the greatest extent practicable each Federal agency shall cooperate with the Secretary and the States in carrying out the provisions of this chapter.

children.heading: Major Federal action
children.label: d Major Federal action
children.text: Approval of the State programs, pursuant to , promulgation of Federal programs, pursuant to , and implementation of the Federal lands programs, pursuant to , shall not constitute a major action within the meaning of section 102(2)(C) of the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 (). Adoption of regulations under shall constitute a major action within the meaning of section 102(2)(C) of the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 ().section 1253(b) of this titlesection 1254 of this titlesection 1273 of this title42 U.S.C. 4332section 1251(b) of this title42 U.S.C. 4332
